# Thrum

> A framework-agnostic node-and-edge graph library for building visual flow editors, pipeline builders, and diagram tools.

Thrum ships a headless core (`@thrum/core`) with a first-class SolidJS adapter (`@thrum/solid`).

## Packages

- **@thrum/core** — the store, types, edge-path functions, hit-testing, serialization, and history. Zero DOM dependencies.
- **@thrum/solid** — SolidJS components and hooks that bind the store to a reactive, interactive canvas.

## Installation

```bash
bun install @thrum/core @thrum/solid
```

## Core Concepts

The central object is **FlowStore**, created by `createFlowStore()`. All mutations go through the store; UI components subscribe reactively.

### Store

```typescript
import { createFlowStore, nodeId, edgeId } from "@thrum/core";

const store = createFlowStore({
  nodes: [
    { id: nodeId("a"), position: { x: 0, y: 0 }, data: { label: "Node A" } },
    { id: nodeId("b"), position: { x: 200, y: 100 }, data: { label: "Node B" } },
  ],
  edges: [{ id: edgeId("a-b"), source: nodeId("a"), target: nodeId("b") }],
});
```

### SolidJS Setup

Wrap your canvas in `Flow.Root` to provide context. Compose `Flow.NodeLayer` and `Flow.EdgeLayer` inside `Flow.Canvas`.

```tsx
import { Flow } from "@thrum/solid";
import { createFlowStore, edgeId } from "@thrum/core";

function App() {
  const store = createFlowStore();

  return (
    <Flow.Root store={store} onConnect={(c) => store.addEdge({ ...c, id: edgeId() })}>
      <Flow.Canvas>
        <Flow.NodeLayer>
          {(node) => (
            <Flow.Node node={node}>
              <div class="node">{node.data.label}</div>
            </Flow.Node>
          )}
        </Flow.NodeLayer>
        <Flow.EdgeLayer>
          {(edge, coords) => <path d={getBezierPath(coords).path} fill="none" stroke="#888" />}
        </Flow.EdgeLayer>
      </Flow.Canvas>
    </Flow.Root>
  );
}
```

### Handles

Handles are the connection points on nodes. Place them inside a `Flow.Node` with a `type` of `source` or `target` and a `position`.

```tsx
<Flow.Handle type="target" position="left" />
<Flow.Handle type="source" position="right" />
```

### Edge Paths

Edge path functions convert source/target coordinates into SVG path strings.

```typescript
import { getBezierPath, getStraightPath, getSmoothStepPath } from "@thrum/core";

const { path, labelX, labelY } = getBezierPath({ sourceX, sourceY, sourcePosition, targetX, targetY, targetPosition });
const { path } = getStraightPath({ sourceX, sourceY, targetX, targetY });
const { path } = getSmoothStepPath({ sourceX, sourceY, targetX, targetY });
```

### Connection Validation

```typescript
import { wouldCreateCycle } from "@thrum/core";

const store = createFlowStore({
  isValidConnection(connection, state) {
    if (connection.source === connection.target) return false;
    return !wouldCreateCycle(connection, [...state.edges.values()]);
  },
});
```

### Hooks

```typescript
import { useFlow, useLiveNode } from "@thrum/solid";

// Access the store from anywhere inside <Flow.Root>
const { store } = useFlow();

// Inside a custom node — get a reactive snapshot
const node = useLiveNode<{ label: string }>();
```

### History (Undo/Redo)

```typescript
import { History } from "@thrum/core";

const history = new History(50);
history.push({ undo: { nodeChanges: [...], edgeChanges: [] }, redo: { nodeChanges: [...], edgeChanges: [] } });
const changes = history.undo();
```

### Serialization

```typescript
import { serializeFlow, deserializeFlow, flowToString, flowFromString } from "@thrum/core";

const json = serializeFlow(store);
localStorage.setItem("flow", flowToString(json));
```

## Core Exports

Types: NodeId, EdgeId, HandleId, XY, Rect, HandleType, HandlePosition, HandleBounds, HandleRect, Connection, NodeBase, InternalNode, EdgeBase, Viewport, NodeChange, EdgeChange, StoreChangeSet, EdgePathParams, EdgePathResult, EdgePathFunction, FitViewOptions, ActiveConnection, FlowStoreState, FlowStore, NodeTypeDefinition, SerializedNode, SerializedEdge, FlowJSON

Functions: createFlowStore, wouldCreateCycle, nodeId, edgeId, handleId, getBezierPath, getSmoothStepPath, getStepPath, getStraightPath, registerEdgePath, getEdgePath, computeHandleBounds, resolveHandleCenter, createDragState, computeDragPosition, getNodesInBox, hitTestNode, serializeFlow, deserializeFlow, flowToString, flowFromString, screenToFlow, flowToScreen, clampZoom, zoomAroundPoint

Classes: History

## Solid Adapter Exports

Components: Flow (Flow.Root, Flow.Canvas, Flow.NodeLayer, Flow.EdgeLayer, Flow.Node, Flow.Handle, Flow.ConnectionLine)
Hooks: useFlow, useNodeId, useLiveNode, createNodeDrag, createBoxSelection, createFlowContextValue
